title: HotbarKeys
description: Instantly perform left/right clicks on hotbar items without manual slot switching. Perfect for building, combat, and tool usage!
body:
Short description

A Minecraft 1.20.1 mod that lets you bind keys to hotbar slots. When a keybind is pressed, the mod switches to the selected slot, automatically performs Right Click or Left Click (configurable), and then switches back to the original slot. Mod settings can be opened with H.

Detailed description

This mod makes quick item usage much easier.
Features:

Custom keybinds for any hotbar slot.

 Automatically use the item with Right Click or Left Click.

Return to the original slot after activation.

# Settings menu opens with H.
